name: Daeho Al Co.,Ltd.
summary: Daeho Al Co.,Ltd. produces and sells various aluminum products in South Korea. It offers aluminum coils and sheets that are used as material for various industries, such as LCD, PDP, PDA, mobile phone, vehicle, etc.; circle sheets for use in kitchen utensil industries, etc.; and special steel materials for use in the construction, as well as products for nano and bio industries. The company is based in Daegu, South Korea.
